---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.page-icon}
<img src="image/coffee-kiosk.svg" alt="" aria-hidden="true">
:::

# Knock on my door

Thanks for visiting my corner of the world,

If you would like to discuss research, teaching, collaboration opportunities, or simply exchange ideas, I would be delighted to hear from you. You can find me on:

:::{}
- [My Email](mailto:tuan.cao@griffith.edu.au)
- [My Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/toddcao811/)
- [My Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/kelvin.cao.9250)
- [My WhatsApp](https://wa.me/61471029492)
:::

I hope to see you one day in person. And in case I don't see you, good afternoon, good evening, and good night!

[Download My Resume](ToddCao_Resume.pdf){.btn .btn-danger target="_blank"}
